message:
feat(br-2bbt.2.2): toast overlay rendering — severity colors, Ctrl+T focus mode

Add severity-colored toast styles (error=red, warning=orange, info=green,
success=teal) matching tui_events palette. Add Ctrl+T toast focus mode
with Up/Down navigation, Enter to dismiss, Esc to exit, and a highlight
border overlay on the focused toast with hint text. Extract helper fns
(highlight_toast_border, render_focus_hint) for clippy compliance.
Fix clippy: const fn allows(), try_from for timestamp/ttl casts,
saturating arithmetic. 15 new unit tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
